_comment: GSIN (Goods and Services Identification Number) codes relevant for BPW Defence — Trailers, Axles, Vehicle Components. Source: CanadaBuys GSIN codeset. Reviewed 2026-05-11.

top_level.23: Ground Effect Vehicles, Motor Vehicles, Trailers and Cycles

motor_vehicles.2350: Combat, Assault and Tactical Vehicles, Tracked

vehicle_components.2510: Vehicular Cab, Body, and Frame Structural Components
vehicle_components.2530: Vehicular Brake, Steering, Axle, Wheel, and Track Components

_notes: GSIN code 2530 = Axle, Wheel, and Track Components (BPW axle supply chain)
GSIN code 2350 = Tracked Vehicles — indirect relevance (LSVW, MSVS, HLVW programs often use trailer support)
